attributes.description: Golden signals overview: errors, throughput, and saturation for Nginx.

params.markdown:
## Request Health

Monitor NGINX golden signals — errors, throughput, and saturation — at a glance.

- **Errors**: 4xx client and 5xx server error rates from access logs
- **Error logs**: Severity breakdown from NGINX error log
- **Throughput**: Request rate derived from stub_status metrics
- **Saturation**: Connection states and dropped connections
- **Accepts & Handled**: Connection processing rates

panelsJSON.title: Requests by Status Code Over Time

filter.query: NOT attributes.log.level: "error" AND NOT attributes.log.level: "crit" AND NOT attributes.log.level: "warn"
